auth.returningSession: Returning your Microsoft session to AzulClaw.

desktop.preparingNestDesc: Loading profile, sandbox and companion state before opening the desktop.
desktop.azureSettingsKept: AzulClaw kept your Azure resource, model and Key Vault settings. It only needs a new Microsoft token for this session.
desktop.azureSignInWarning: Without Microsoft sign-in, AzulClaw cannot call Azure OpenAI or use your Azure-backed resources in this session.
thinking: On it. Give me a moment.
Working through it step by step.
typing: I can feel a question forming.

chat.typeMessage: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.disclaimer: AzulClaw can make mistakes. Consider verifying important information.
chat.welcomeMessage: Hey there! I'm glad you're here. Tell me what you're working on, or ask me anything — I'm all ears. How can I help today?

context.title: Operational state and local context
context.footer: Context groups live process visibility, durable memory, and workspace scope.

memory.noMemoriesYet: No memories yet. Chat with AzulClaw to start building context.
memory.selectRecord: Select a memory record to preview it.
memory.deleteError: Could not delete. Check the backend is running.

process.selectProcess: Select a process to see its details.

workspace.sandboxNote: AzulClaw can only read and write within this sandbox.
workspace.workspaceFile: Workspace file {{name}} is available inside the active sandbox.
workspace.workspaceFolder: {{name}} is part of the current sandbox structure.

lane.autoDesc: Let AzulClaw choose based on the task complexity
lane.fastDesc: Always use the fast model — quick, lightweight tasks
lane.slowDesc: Always use the slow model — deliberate, context-heavy tasks

descriptions.Email: Read and draft emails from a connected account.
descriptions.Telegram: Send notifications and operate through a bot.
descriptions.Workspace: Read, write and organise files within the sandbox.
descriptions.Terminal: Execute controlled local actions — requires confirmation.

settings.footer: Heartbeat and scheduled job settings live in the Heartbeats view.

azure.title: Azure OpenAI connection
azure.desc: Re-run the same Azure connection flow used during onboarding: sign in, discover resources, choose deployments and authorize Azure OpenAI access.

desktop.title: Quick access
desktop.desc: Add a Claude-style desktop access layer: tray icon, a global shortcut and optional close-to-tray behavior.
desktop.enableShortcutDesc: Press {{shortcut}} to bring AzulClaw to the front and focus chat.
desktop.showTrayIconDesc: Keep AzulClaw available from the system tray with open, hide and quit actions.
desktop.closeToTrayDesc: When the window close button is pressed, hide AzulClaw instead of exiting.
desktop.languageDesc: Choose the language for the user interface.

runtime.title: Local brain process
runtime.noModelsWarning: Backend is running, but no model profile is enabled. Chat will answer with the runtime configuration warning until a provider is configured.
runtime.offlineWarning: The desktop UI cannot reach the backend. Check the packaged app logs or rebuild the installer after backend changes.
runtime.modelsDesc: Configure AI providers, deployments and fallback strategy for fast and slow lanes.

memory.title: Storage and retrieval
memory.desc: Persistent memory uses a SQLite database under the workspace by default. Override it only when you want to keep memory in a different local folder.
memory.dbOverrideNote: Leave empty to use the workspace default.

identity.title: Personality
identity.desc: Configure how AzulClaw presents itself - its name, tone, style and base role.
identity.name: Name

security.title: Workspace and approvals
security.desc: Manage confirmation boundaries, workspace location and the local guardrails around file and tool access.

data.title: Erase local AzulClaw data
data.desc: Removes the SQLite memory database and resets your profile setup. You will go through Hatching again. Restart the brain process afterward so memory reopens cleanly.

modal.label: DESTRUCTIVE ACTION
modal.title: Confirm data erasure
modal.desc: This will permanently delete all memory and reset your profile. To confirm, copy and type the phrase below.

heartbeats.title: Heartbeats
heartbeats.description: Scheduled checks, reminders, and workspace routines.
heartbeats.name: Name
heartbeats.instructionsPlaceholder: What should this heartbeat do on each run?
heartbeats.protectedNote: Protected heartbeats use a recurring interval.

hatching.pressEnterToSkip: Press Enter to skip for now
hatching.settingUpDesc: Creating workspace folders, initialising memory database...
hatching.readyDesc: This is the starting point. Everything can be adjusted later from Settings.

identity.title: Profile setup
identity.hint: Adjust your agent's core personality and environment at any time.

name.title: What do you want to call your AzulClaw?
name.helper: That will be its name in the app. You can change it whenever you like.

role.title: What do you want it to be for you?
role.helper: Answer freely. There is no wrong answer.
role.placeholder: I want you to be my technical assistant for organising tasks, code and decisions.

mission.title: What should its main mission be?
mission.helper: This defines where it should focus when working with you.
mission.placeholder: Help me move forward with focus, context and order.

character.title: How do you want it to talk and act?
character.helper: Describe its tone, style and how much autonomy you want to give it.
character.placeholder: Direct, clear, technical and proactive, but confirm sensitive actions.

azure.title: Connect your Azure
azure.helper: Sign in with Microsoft so AzulClaw can use your Azure resources without local API keys.

capabilities.title: Which integrations do you want to activate?
capabilities.helper: Connect external tools like email or messaging. Click an integration to configure it — it activates once you complete the setup.

superpowers.title: Give it superpowers
superpowers.body: Give your agent superpowers with skills
superpowers.bodyDesc: Expand what your assistant knows and can do — across any domain.

workspace.title: Which folder will be its workspace?
workspace.helper: Pick a folder: file tools use it as the sandbox, and persistent memory (SQLite) is stored in a .azul subfolder inside it. You can change the memory path later from Settings.

azure.workAccountDesc: Use Microsoft sign-in and discover tenants automatically.
azure.personalAccountDesc: Use this when your subscription is paid with @outlook.com/.es.
azure.tenantIdNote: Find it in Azure Portal under Microsoft Entra ID or in the App Registration overview.
azure.personalNote: Personal Microsoft accounts must authenticate through the Azure tenant that owns the subscription.
azure.guidedNote: Automatic discovery starts with login. Tenant, subscription, resource and deployments unlock after Microsoft confirms your account.
azure.microsoftLoginChoiceDesc: Sign in with Microsoft to discover your Azure resources and keep the standard authorization flow.
azure.apiKeyChoiceDesc: Connect directly to Azure OpenAI with your endpoint, deployment names, and API key.
azure.apiKeyNotAvailable: Available only where AzulClaw can store the key securely on the desktop.
azure.storedKeyWarning: This key is stored locally on this machine. Use this mode only as a fallback when Microsoft login is not available.
azure.signInFirst: Sign in first to unlock tenant, subscription and resource discovery.
azure.keyVaultNote: Runtime settings and secrets will be loaded from this vault.
azure.noDeploymentsNote: No deployments were returned for this resource. You can type the deployment names manually, or refresh if you just created them in Azure.
azure.apiKeyModeNote: This mode sets up direct Azure OpenAI access with one endpoint, one API key, and the deployment names below.
azure.finishNoteApi: Advanced mode. AzulClaw will use the endpoint, deployment names and API key directly, without Microsoft login.
azure.finishNoteEntra: AzulClaw will request an Azure OpenAI token, apply the selected Key Vault URL locally, and keep the token in memory.
azure.connectedNoteApi: Azure OpenAI is configured with a local API key.
azure.connectedNoteApiWith: Azure OpenAI is configured with a local API key. Last connected {{date}}.
azure.connectedNoteEntraKeyVault: Azure OpenAI access is authorized. Key Vault: {{vault}}.
azure.connectedNoteEntraWith: Azure OpenAI access is authorized. Last authorized {{date}}.
azure.enterClientId: Enter the Azure app registration client ID.
azure.pasteTenantId: Paste the Directory (tenant) ID for the Azure directory that contains your subscription.
azure.enterApiKey: Enter the Azure OpenAI API key.
azure.selectResourceOrEndpoint: Select an Azure OpenAI resource or enter the endpoint manually.
azure.storedKeyUnavailable: The previously stored Azure OpenAI API key is no longer available on this machine. Paste a new key to reconnect.
azure.couldNotReadKey: AzulClaw could not read the API key stored on this machine. Paste a new key to reconnect.

workspaceErrors.nativeSelectorOnly: The native selector is only available inside the Tauri desktop app.
workspaceErrors.couldNotOpen: Could not open the native selector.

skills.note: Here you don't type free text. You can only activate skills from the available catalogue.
skills.clickNote: Clicking a skill opens its configuration. It won't be activated until you complete that popup.
skills.skipNote: If you don't want to activate any yet, continue with Skip for now.

Email.title: Email
Email.description: Read and prepare emails from a connected account.

Telegram.title: Telegram
Telegram.description: Send notifications and operate through a bot.

chatId.label: Chat ID
chatId.helper: Chat or user authorised to talk with AzulClaw.

Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Post messages and handle events in work channels.

botToken.label: Bot token
botToken.helper: Bot token with the required permissions.

defaultChannel.label: Default channel
defaultChannel.helper: Main channel where it can write.

Alexa.title: Alexa
Alexa.description: Connect voice actions and home routines.

workspace.think: Think of it as AzulClaw's desk. Everything it reads, creates or organises will live inside that folder.
workspace.pasteOrAdjust: You can also paste or adjust the path manually.
workspace.actWithout: Let it act without prior confirmation

skip.azureTitle: AzulClaw will not work without Azure
skip.azureDesc: If you skip this step, the assistant cannot call Azure OpenAI or use your Azure resources. You can continue only to finish the profile and connect Azure later from settings.

apiKeyWarning.title: Use API key mode only as a fallback
apiKeyWarning.desc: Microsoft login is the recommended path. Use API key mode only when your tenant blocks Microsoft sign-in or when you need a manual Azure OpenAI connection.
apiKeyWarning.storageWarning: This mode stores an Azure OpenAI API key locally on this machine.

apiKeyConnect.title: This stores a local Azure OpenAI key
apiKeyConnect.desc: AzulClaw will connect directly to Azure OpenAI with the endpoint, deployment names, and API key you entered.
apiKeyConnect.fallbackWarning: This is a fallback path. If Microsoft login is available in your tenant, that remains the recommended configuration.
